clients.subtitle: We source talent for leading manufacturers and employers across the Upstate SC region.

locationsPreview.title: Locations We Service
locationsPreview.subtitle: With offices across the Southeast, we're always close to where you need us.

tabbedTestimonials.title: Trusted by Workers & Employers
tabbedTestimonials.subtitle: Hear from the people who know us best — the workers we've placed and the businesses we serve.

referFriend.title: Know Someone Looking for Work?
referFriend.description: Refer a friend to OpSource and help them find their next opportunity. Great jobs. Great pay. Great people.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Whether you're looking for your next opportunity or need to build your team, we're here to help.

urgencyBanner.headline: We're Hiring NOW — Walk In or Apply Online!
urgencyBanner.subtext: Walk in today or apply online — most candidates start within 3 days

hero.title: We Are Here For You
hero.subtitle: 20+ years connecting hardworking people with great companies across the Southeast.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.subtitle: Deep experience in the sectors that power the Southeast economy.
industries.automotiveDesc: Assembly lines, quality control, and production support staff.
industries.foodDesc: Processing, packaging, sanitation, and warehouse operations.
industries.distributionDesc: Forklift operators, pickers, packers, and shipping coordinators.
industries.constructionDesc: Skilled trades, general laborers, and site support personnel.
industries.aerospaceDesc: Precision assembly, inspection, and certified technical roles.
industries.pharmaDesc: Cleanroom operators, batch processing, and compliance-ready staff.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We keep our promises to clients and workers — showing up on time, every time, with honesty you can count on.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We vet every candidate thoroughly and follow up relentlessly so your operation never misses a beat.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.description: We build lasting relationships — not one-time placements. Many of our clients and workers have been with us for 10+ years.

servantLeadership.title: Servant-Leadership
servantLeadership.description: We answer the phone, solve problems same-day, and treat every person who walks through our door with respect.

testimonialHighlight.quote: I walked in on a Monday and was working by Wednesday. They treated me like a person, not just a number.
testimonialHighlight.author: — Marcus T., Forklift Operator, Greenville SC

difference.title: The OpSource Difference
difference.quote: At OpSource, our #1 focus is you.
difference.mission: Our mission is to serve and connect great people to great companies through our shared vision of building a business that is the right choice for service and connection.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive staffing and workforce solutions tailored to your business needs.

traditional.title: Traditional Staffing
traditional.description: Our traditional staffing solutions provide the flexibility your business needs. Whether you require temporary workers for seasonal peaks, temp-to-hire arrangements to evaluate candidates, or on-site management, we deliver qualified professionals ready to contribute from day one.

skilledTrades.title: Skilled Trades
skilledTrades.description: Our skilled trades division specializes in placing qualified tradespeople across manufacturing, construction, and industrial sectors. From welders and electricians to CNC operators and maintenance technicians, we connect experienced professionals with employers who value their expertise.

directHire.title: Direct Hire
directHire.description: When you need to find the perfect permanent addition to your team, our direct hire division delivers. We handle the full recruitment cycle — from sourcing and screening to interviewing and offer negotiation — ensuring every candidate aligns with your company culture and long-term goals.

payroll.title: Payroll Services
payroll.description: Let us handle the complexity of payroll so you can focus on growing your business. Our payroll services include processing, tax filing, compliance management, and reporting — all streamlined to save you time and reduce administrative burden.
bullets: Weekly pay processing with direct deposit

candidateJourney.title: Your Path to a Great Job
candidateJourney.subtitle: No resume? No problem. Here's how easy it is to get started.

step1.title: Walk In or Apply Online
step1.description: Visit any of our locations or apply online. No appointment needed. Bring a valid ID and we'll get you started.

step2.title: Quick Interview & Skills Match
step2.description: We'll chat about your experience, skills, and what kind of work you're looking for. Same-day interviews available.

step3.title: Orientation & Safety Training
step3.description: Complete a brief orientation and any required safety training. We make sure you're set up for success.

step4.title: Start Working
step4.description: Most candidates are placed within 3 days. Get paid weekly with direct deposit available.

candidateJourney.walkInNote: Or walk into any location — no appointment needed

whatToBring.title: What to Bring When You Visit
whatToBring.subtitle: Coming in to apply? Here's what you'll need to get started quickly.

validId.title: Valid Photo ID
validId.description: Driver's license, state ID, or passport

ssCard.title: Social Security Card
ssCard.description: Or other proof of work eligibility

workHistory.title: Work History
workHistory.description: Names and dates of recent employers — no formal resume needed

steelToes.title: Steel-Toed Boots
steelToes.description: Required for many industrial positions — we'll let you know

steelToeBoots.title: Steel-Toe Boots
steelToeBoots.description: Required for most warehouse & industrial positions

recruitingProcess.title: Our Recruiting Process
recruitingProcess.subtitle: A streamlined process designed to get you the right people, fast.

step1.title: Submit Your Needs
step1.description: Tell us about the positions you need filled and your specific requirements.

step2.title: We Source & Screen
step2.description: Our recruiters identify, interview, and vet qualified candidates for your roles.

step3.title: Review & Select
step3.description: Review pre-screened candidates and select the best fit for your team.

step4.title: Onboard & Succeed
step4.description: We handle onboarding and follow up to ensure long-term success.

cta.title: Need a Custom Staffing Solution?
cta.subtitle: Every business is unique. Let's build a workforce plan that fits your needs perfectly.

hero.title: Our Locations
hero.subtitle: With offices across the Southeast, we're always close to where you need us.

cta.title: Don't See Your Location?
cta.subtitle: We offer on-site services and can work with businesses across the Southeast. Reach out to learn more.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Have a question or need staffing support? We'd love to hear from you.

textBanner.title: Prefer to Text?
textBanner.subtitle: Send us a text message and a recruiter will respond right away.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.subject: Subject *
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
form.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within one business day.

validation.nameRequired: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address
validation.messageRequired: Message must be at least 10 characters

quickApply.title: Quick Apply
quickApply.subtitle: No resume needed — we'll call you back within 2 hours.
quickApply.smsOptIn: I agree to receive SMS messages about job opportunities
quickApply.emailOptIn: I agree to receive email updates about jobs and services
quickApply.successMessage: A recruiter will call you back within 2 hours during business hours.

validation.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address

immediateHelp.title: Need Immediate Help?
immediateHelp.subtitle: Call us directly and speak with a recruiter right away.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

footer.seoDescription: Connecting hardworking people with great companies across SC, NC & TN since 2003. Industrial staffing, skilled trades, and workforce solutions.
footer.eeoStatement: Equal Opportunity Employer. OpSource Staffing is committed to providing equal employment opportunities regardless of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or veteran status.

chat.title: OpSource Assistant
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm the OpSource assistant. How can I help you today?
chat.leadCaptureIntro: I'd be happy to connect you with our team! Let me grab a few details.
chat.leadCaptureComplete: Thank you! A member of our team will reach out to you soon.
chat.leadCaptureAnythingElse: Is there anything else I can help you with?
chat.connectPrompt: Would you like me to connect you with our team?
